A lengthy '''campaign''' occurred over the course of three months in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Milagro/Legends|Milagro]]. Milagro was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located at an important [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperroute]] junction and contained large-scale manufacturing facilities. The [[New Republic Army]] fought on the world for three months before the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces withdrew, initiating a [[Base Delta Zero/Legends|Base Delta Zero]] operation to destroy anything of worth on the planet.

In the aftermath, a small Alliance fleet remained in the orbit of the planet consisting of an old [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]], the [[Hospital ship/Legends|hospital ship]] [[Mercy (hospital ship)|''Mercy'']], two [[Assault Frigate Mark I|Assault Frigates]], a [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of [[DP20 gunship/Legends|Corellian gunships]] and various support vessels.<ref name="Dark Forces: Rebel Agent">''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]''</ref>''
